# ⏰  Get Free WordPress eCommerce Training [Last Chance]

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-04-29 17:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 725

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Want to sell digital goods on your WordPress website?

Whether you want to sell ebooks, courses, templates, or any
digital downloads, we can show you how with our free eCommerce
workshop!

But act fast! Now is your last chance to join our workshop and
get free training.

👉 SAVE YOUR SPOT: Launch Your Digital Product Store in 90
Minutes! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..dSunl7y5BqqtaPJPvP9FDDDgA4w37BJFCscP_lIO1UI )

Your Workshop Host: Ryan Priddey, Video Content Manager at
WPBeginner

Date & Time: Wednesday, 30th April, at 10.30 am EST.

Here's what you'll learn:

* How to set up an online store in WordPress and start selling
digital products.
* Important marketing techniques and tools to grow your store.
* Easy tips to keep your store running smoothly

Plus, stay for the live Q&A session, where Ryan will answer all
your specific questions about launching your store.

Don't miss this opportunity to finally launch your digital
store. Click here to secure your spot today before it's too late!
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..dSunl7y5BqqtaPJPvP9FDDDgA4w37BJFCscP_lIO1UI ) ⏰

See you soon,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
